THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BATES, GEORGE R THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 917 FOLSOM STREET #405, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $200.00, STAYED UNTIL MAR-06-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, EXEC ON WRIT STAYED 6 MOS FROM ENTRY OF JUDGMNT ON CERTAIN CONDITIONS:SEE JUDGMENT. PLTF WILL PROVIDE DEFT WITH A SATISF OF JUDGMNT IF CONDS MET FOR 6 MOS. IF DEFT DEFAULTS IN CONDS, PLTF MAY APPLY EX-PARTE UPON 24HRS TELEPHONE NOTICE TO DEFT TO LIFT STAY UPON DECLARATION.
